description: Module lock registry — paths that require explicit exception approval to modify. See plan BTCAAAAA-1479.

entries.reason: UnifiedDataManager — shared single source of truth for data ingestion, caching, and retrieval. Any uncoordinated change risks cascading failures across backtesting, live trading, and dry-run pipelines.
TradeRegistry — central ledger for all optimizer-produced trade records. Uncoordinated schema or logic changes can silently corrupt trade history and backtest replay.
InstitutionalSignalEvaluator — evaluates and ranks institutional-grade signals before they enter the optimizer. Changes here can alter portfolio allocation logic across all modes.
Building block registry — dynamic discovery and registration of all detector building block types. Uncoordinated changes can break detector instantiation across the entire pipeline.
ITM state manager — live position persistence layer for institutional trade management. Accidental changes can cause incorrect P&L tracking or position reconciliation failures.

9 ORM managers under optimizer_v3/database — unified database access layer for strategy configs, trade results, and calibration state. Uncoordinated schema or connection changes risk data corruption across all tools.
Lock gate enforcement script — the CI gate itself must be locked to prevent tampering that would bypass module lock protections.
Module lock registry — the list of locked modules itself must be locked to prevent unauthorized modification of locked path entries.
Lock gate exceptions — the allowlist that bypasses the lock gate must itself be locked to prevent unapproved exceptions from being added.
Lock gate CI workflow — the workflow that runs the lock gate must be locked to prevent disabling the gate in CI.
Canary trade execution test — the zero-trades regression test that triggered this lock system must be preserved. Uncoordinated changes could mask a repeat of the original regression.
Locked module exception request template — the template for requesting exceptions must be locked to ensure the required approval fields and CTO sign-off gate remain intact.
